Heavenly Father,
We come before You with humble hearts, seeking Your divine protection and grace. Lord, You command the winds and the seas, and nothing is too great for Your power. We ask that You place Your mighty hand over this storm and calm its force, diminishing it until it disappears like it was never even going to form.
Lord, we trust in Your ability to shield us from danger, to bring peace where there is fear, and to provide safety for all in the path of this storm. We ask You to cover our homes, our loved ones, and our communities with Your protection.
Father, we know that You are in control. Let Your will be done, and let this storm be turned away. We pray for peace, for safety, and for the strength to trust in You completely.
In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
